languages.text: "Как вам будет угодно, Ваша Светлость. Высокий Фактотум взял на себя все необходимые приготовления и встретит вас на месте".
languages.translation_comment:
Завершение диалога. Нет перехода в медотсек
Если VisitMedbay_quest не взят, он присваивается

Завершение диалога. Нет перехода в медотсек

languages.text: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The High Factotum has taken it upon himself to make the necessary preparations. He will meet you there."
languages.original_text: "Как вам будет угодно, Ваша Светлость. Высокий Фактотум взял на себя все необходимые приготовления и встретит вас на месте".

traits.locale_text: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The High Factotum has taken it upon himself to make the necessary preparations. He will meet you there."
"As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The High Factotum has taken it upon himself to make the necessary preparations. He will meet you there."
"As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The High Factotum has taken it upon himself to make the necessary preparations. He will meet you there."
"As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The High Factotum has taken it upon himself to make the necessary preparations. He will meet you there."

languages.text: 「ご指摘の通りでございます、御{mf|殿|殿}。」
"Nasıl isterseniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Arşıkâhya, gerekli hazırlıkları yapmayı üstlendi. Sizinle orada buluşacak."
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The High Factotum has taken it upon himself to make the necessary preparations. He will meet you there."

traits.locale_text: "Nasıl isterseniz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Arşıkâhya, gerekli hazırlıkları yapmayı üstlendi. Sizinle orada buluşacak."

languages.text: “遵命，大人。高阶顾问已主动承担起必要的筹备工作。他会在那里与您会合。”
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The High Factotum has taken it upon himself to make the necessary preparations. He will meet you there."

traits.locale_text: “遵命，大人。高阶顾问已主动承担起必要的筹备工作。他会在那里与您会合。”

languages.text: "Wie Ihr wünscht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Das Hoch-Faktotum hat es auf sich genommen, die nötigen Vorbereitungen zu treffen. Er wird Euch dort treffen."
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The High Factotum has taken it upon himself to make the necessary preparations. He will meet you there."

traits.locale_text: "Wie Ihr wünscht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Das Hoch-Faktotum hat es auf sich genommen, die nötigen Vorbereitungen zu treffen. Er wird Euch dort treffen."

languages.text: « Très juste, Votre Seigneurie. Le haut factotum a accompli les préparatifs nécessaires. Il vous attendra sur place. »
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The High Factotum has taken it upon himself to make the necessary preparations. He will meet you there."

traits.locale_text: « Très juste, Votre Seigneurie. Le haut factotum a accompli les préparatifs nécessaires. Il vous attendra sur place. »

languages.text: «Como ordene, mi{mf|lord|lady}. El Sumo Factótum ya ha emprendido los preparativos necesarios y se reunirá con usted allí».
languages.original_text: "As you say, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The High Factotum has taken it upon himself to make the necessary preparations. He will meet you there."

traits.locale_text: «Como ordene, mi{mf|lord|lady}. El Sumo Factótum ya ha emprendido los preparativos necesarios y se reunirá con usted allí».
